name: tse-jira
description: TSE-focused Jira ticket creation for Redis Technical Support Engineers. Four slash commands — /tse-jira:new (interactive router), /tse-jira:bug, /tse-jira:rca, /tse-jira:score. Each command falls back to interactive mode when invoked without args; validates inputs as you go. Dry-run by default with HTML + markdown preview. Multi-project (RED/MOD/DOC/RDSC/RCA), sprint-blank, uses the claude.ai Atlassian MCP.
